title: Emergency Access
description: Allow trusted contacts to access your vault in case of emergency.
trustedContactsDesc: People who can request access to your vault in an emergency.
trustedByOthersDesc: Vaults you have been granted emergency access to.
noGrantsDesc: Add a trusted contact to allow emergency access to your vault.
noTrustedBy: No one has granted you emergency access.
waitDaysDesc: The owner can reject the request during this period.
grantCreatedWithLink: Grant created. Invite URL copied to clipboard.
revokeConfirm: Permanently revoke emergency access for {name}? This cannot be undone.
approveRequestConfirm: Immediately grant {name} emergency access to your vault? The wait period will be skipped.
requestAccessConfirm: {name} will be notified. After {days} days, you will gain vault access unless the owner rejects.
acceptInviteDesc: You have been invited as an emergency contact.
declineConfirm: Are you sure you want to decline {name}'s emergency access invitation?
invalidInvitation: This invitation is invalid or has expired. Please ask the owner to send a new invitation.
invitationAlreadyUsed: This invitation has already been used.
rateLimitExceeded: Too many requests. Please try again later.
grantNotPending: This grant is no longer pending.
cannotAccessOwnGrant: Cannot accept your own emergency access grant.
notAuthorizedForGrant: You are not authorized for this grant.
invalidStatus: This action is not available in the current status.
duplicateGrant: An active grant already exists for this email.
notActivated: Emergency access has not been activated yet.
keyEscrowNotCompleted: Key escrow is not yet completed. The vault owner needs to unlock their vault.
invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
ownerHintPending: Share the invite URL with the contact. Status advances when they accept.
ownerHintAccepted: The contact has accepted. Keep your vault unlocked — key escrow will complete automatically.
ownerHintIdle: Ready. Waiting for the contact to request access.
ownerHintStale: The contact's key data is stale. They need to re-accept the invitation.
ownerHintRequested: The contact has requested access. Please approve or reject.
ownerHintActivated: The contact has been granted access to your vault.
granteeHintPending: You have been invited by the owner. Accept or decline.
granteeHintAccepted: Accepted. Waiting for the owner to complete key setup. This happens automatically when the owner unlocks their vault.
granteeHintIdle: Ready. Use "Request Access" to notify the owner in an emergency.
granteeHintStale: Your key data is stale. It will be updated automatically when the owner unlocks their vault.
granteeHintRequested: Request sent. You will gain vault access after the wait period ({days} days) or when the owner approves.
granteeHintActivated: You can now access the vault.
granteeHintRevoked: This grant has been revoked by the owner.
